creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Guido Falsi from comment #2)
Thanks for the commit.

I usually test my ports against the last snapshot, but I needed to send another update for devel/visualparadigm and there seems to be a problem with java/openjdk8 that I tried to avoid by keeping a slightly older ports tree.

Sorry for the inconvenience!
